### Product Information

- Easily apply your favorite detailing chemical!

- Saves effort and time with less trigger pulls

- Safe for acids and other strong detailing chemicals

- Improves on the already popular [IK Multi 1.5 Sprayer](https://www.detailedimage.com/IK-M111/Multi-15-Sprayer-P1860/35-oz-S1/)

- Product Code: 81671

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

92% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 12 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The IK Multi Pro 2 Sprayer will help you easily spray your favorite detailing chemicals! When using a traditional spray bottle, you can quickly become tired when having to pull the trigger over and over. With the IK Multi Pro 2, you will have everything you loved about the [IK Multi 1.5 Sprayer](https://www.detailedimage.com/IK-M111/Multi-15-Sprayer-P1860/35-oz-S1/), with some newly added features! The Multi Pro 2 features a pump at the top of the bottle, allowing you to pump up the pressure and disperse your favorite detailing chemical with the simple push of the thumb trigger. Hold the trigger and the product within the bottle will be dispersed until the pressure in the bottle has been completely released. This not only saves you the effort of multiple trigger pulls, but can save you valuable detailing time as well. This bottle features a safety valve with depressurization and a protective sleeve for the valve chamber. This protective sleeve works optimally with disinfectants, neutral products, and acids. It is also suitable with solvent-based pesticides, alcohols, and oils, solvents and petroleum by-products. The new trigger lock system helps you avoid any accidental discharges and the non-wobble base saves the unit from accidental tip-overs. The two new color caps fit on the end of the hollow handle, which also acts as a storage area for your fan sprayer and your multi-spray tip. Whichever tip you are not using, toss in the handle to keep safe. Pick up the IK Multi Pro 2 Sprayer and save valuable time when applying your favorite detailing chemical!



**Important** - Run water through the unit and depressurize before storing. This helps stop premature wear on the seals. 



**360 vs Standard** - The [Multi Pro 2 360 ](https://www.detailedimage.com/IK-M111/Multi-Pro-2-360-Sprayer-P3302/50-oz-S1/) features a flexible tube, designed to pull chemical out of the unit when used at any angle. The standard [Multi Pro 2](https://www.detailedimage.com/IK-M111/Multi-Pro-2-Sprayer-P2013/2-L-S1/) does not feauture this flexible tube.

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by ali i. on 11/18/2023

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I use ONR for pretreatment for washing ceramic coated cars. It is fast, easy, and precise.

Reviewed by Phil C. on 10/6/2023

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Love the sprayer! It's fun to use. It's ergonomic--the handle feels comfortable, and it's powerful! It really puts down a lot of solution fast. It comes with two nozzles. One has a very wide (fan) spray pattern. The other can be adjusted to spray a mist or a jet. Plus, DI has replacement parts which may be needed in the future. A couple of minor drawbacks: you can't lock in the trigger to spray continuously. In other words, you have to keep pressing the button to dispense solution. And opening the chamber is a bit awkward. Nonetheless, it's a great tool.

Reviewed by Stephen S. on 6/30/2023

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

I've resisted buying this spray for a couple years due to it's price. I've been getting by with cheap Harbor Freight pump sprayers and they work, just not very well. Last week, I bit the bullet and bought the latest IK pump sprayer. The difference between the IK and the cheapies are night and day. First, it pumps up much faster and easier. Next the spray pattern is WAY better. The IK has made rinseless pre-spray so much faster and more enjoyable. Highly recommend!
